# Momentum scale difference

## Short Teaching Summary
Momentum scale difference: The momentum of a molecule and a car are vastly different, differing by 27 orders of magnitude (a factor of a billion billion billion). Map connection: this idea links by analogy_for to nearby concepts. Pause point: say the main idea in one short phrase before moving on.

## Difficulty
0.30

## Best Analogy
- The momentum of a molecule and a car are vastly different, differing by 27 orders of magnitude (a factor of a billion billion billion).
